title: hashfm-agent Block
description: Schema for script hashfm blocks. Supports single-command and multi-command forms.

description.description: A single line describing what this command does.

usage.description: A single line showing how to invoke this command.

exits.description: A map of exit codes to plain-language descriptions.

single-command.description: A block for a script with a single invocation form.

multi-command.description: A block for a script that exposes multiple subcommands.
